title: Alabama's Create Modpack
description: A Modpack featuring both Create Mods and random ones.
body:
# ALABAMA'S CREATE MODPACK

Did you ever look for the perfect Create Modpack, but only managed to find the most popular versions such as Create Live 5? Well, this modpack features all the popular Create addons, aswell as the less Popular ones! It also has additional mods that add:
- Seasons - You now will have to manage your crops!
- Various new blocks - either decorative or functional!
- Images - Easily add your favourite memes, images or even videos into the game!
- Cameras - Take pictures of funny moments, beautiful Minecraft sunsets, or even of your pets!
- Backpacks - Need more space for your blocks? Or you need special abilities? Traveler's Backpacks got you covered!
- Carts - NiftyCarts offer both Carts to transport your animals or pets, and storage carts that can surely pack a bunch.
- Economy - Create: Numismatics implements new shops, ATMs and bank systems to your server/world.
- Graves - Died? What a shame! However, you no longer need to rush to get your items back before they despawn! All your items are now in a neat grave, waiting for you to get them back!

### What are you waiting for?
### Download the Modpack now!
